queue.title: Download Queue
queue.subtitle: All recent download jobs and their status.
queue.empty: No download jobs yet. Start a download to see it here.
queue.running_hint: This job is still running. Open the
queue.view_logs: Download page to view live logs.

storage.title: Storage Dashboard
storage.subtitle: Media library usage breakdown by format and folder.

login.subtitle: Sign in to continue
login.error_empty: Please enter your username and password.

home.subtitle: Download high-quality audio from YouTube and hundreds of other sources.

multiple_formats.title: Multiple Formats
multiple_formats.text: Download in MP3, FLAC, M4A, OGG, OPUS, or WAV at the quality you choose.

batch_download.title: Batch Download
batch_download.text: Grab entire playlists or search for multiple songs at once.

real_time_logs.title: Real-time Logs
real_time_logs.text: Watch yt-dlp output stream live while your download is in progress.

media_browser.title: Media Browser
media_browser.text: Sort, play, download, and delete your files directly from the browser.

metadata_cleaner.title: Metadata Cleaner
metadata_cleaner.text: Strip all embedded tags from audio files with optional backups.

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.text: Transcribe audio to text using Whisper directly from the media browser.

melody_extractor.title: Melody Extractor
melody_extractor.text: Extract a melody line from any audio file and export it as MIDI or MusicXML.

my_docs.title: My Docs
my_docs.text: Browse, create, and edit Markdown documents in the browser with live preview and rich-text mode.

ai_analysis.title: AI Analysis
ai_analysis.text: Clean transcripts, analyse song structure, generate tags, and translate lyrics using the Claude AI.

download_queue.title: Download Queue
download_queue.text: Track all download jobs and their status — with optional auto-transcribe and auto-stem on completion.

storage_dashboard.title: Storage Dashboard
storage_dashboard.text: View your media library usage broken down by file format and folder.

user_management.title: User Management
user_management.text: Create and manage user accounts, assign roles, and control access from the admin panel.

download.title: Download Music
download.verbose_label: Verbose output — stream yt-dlp logs in real time
download.post_hint: These run automatically after download completes. Verbose output will be enabled.
download.error_search: Please enter at least one search query.

media.title: Media Files
media.error_select_clean: Select at least one file or folder to clean.
media.delete_errors: Some items could not be deleted:

melody.title: Melody Extraction
melody.subtitle: Extract a melody line from an audio file and export MIDI and MusicXML.
melody.path_hint: Enter the relative path of any audio file in your media library.
melody.error_no_path: Please enter an audio file path.
melody.error_key_mode: Key and mode must both be set together.
melody.processing_hint: Analysing audio — this may take a few minutes.
melody.processing_hint2: pYIN pitch tracking is running in the background.
melody.viewer_locked: Melody extraction is not available for your account.

admin.title: User Management
admin.only_superadmin_edit: Only superadmin can edit this account
admin.confirm_delete: Delete user "{username}"? This cannot be undone.
admin.superadmin_role_locked: The superadmin role cannot be changed.
admin.error_superadmin_only: Only superadmin can modify the superadmin account.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.error_fields: Please fill in all password fields.
profile.error_too_short: New password must be at least 6 characters.
profile.viewer_locked: Password changes are not available for your account.

ai.result_placeholder: Choose an action above to get started.

stem.drop_hint: Supports MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, M4A, AAC · Max 200 MB
stem.audiosep_stems_hint: Each stem is separated using a natural-language prompt. Multiple stems can be selected.
stem.select_stem_required: Select at least one stem to extract.
stem.device_cpu_warning: — separation may take 5–15 min per track
stem.demucs_subtitle: Extract vocals, drums, bass and more using Meta’s Demucs AI model.
stem.lalai_subtitle: Extract stems using the LALAL.AI cloud API. Requires a configured API key.
stem.audiosep_subtitle: Select the sounds you want to extract. AudioSep uses a text-audio neural network to isolate each one from the mix.
stem.library_subtitle: Browse and manage extracted stem output folders stored in media/stems/.
stem.library_empty_hint: Run a separation job from Demucs, LALAL.AI, or AudioSep to get started.
